name: Farmer's Market Corn Relish (Mandel)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups corn kernels, cut from four ears
1 small tomato; outer shell only, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart bowl, combine corn, tomato, green onions, celery, green beans, bell pepper, cider vinegar, oil, water, cilantro, red wine vinegar, mustard, cumin, and salt.
2. Mix ingredients until well combined.
3. Taste the mixture and adjust seasoning as needed.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 to 3 days to allow flavors to develop.
5. Before serving, give the relish a final stir and taste again.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
[12 servings. Each of 12 servings: 55 calories; 238 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol; 3 grams fat; 8 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.54 grams fiber.]
